arts.ttl: Talks ongoing to sign Rangers player – Delusional expectation of bargain deal
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Besiktas are still trying to sign Rangers defender Rıdvan Yılmaz after being linked with him throughout this transfer window. There have been reports in recent weeks that Rangers could offload the Turkey international despite Philippe Clement starting him in the past six league games. arts.ttl: Officials ‘particularly fond’ of Rangers player – On director’s list for late winter move
arts.sum: Rangers manager Philippe Clement may be without Rabbi Matondo beyond the winter market. Ajax have identified the winger as one of the candidates to strengthen their attack in this window. That’s according to De Telegraaf, who explain Ajax technical director Alex Kroes has the Rangers man and two other players in his list.
